phase1_blurb: A Tamil-first assistant for everyday government errands — birth certificates, NIC, Samurdhi, pensions. Find the right office, fee, form, and hours without a wasted trip.
phase2_blurb: Help households assemble defensible evidence of land ownership — photographs, GPS, witness statements, scanned deeds — versioned and tier-labelled.
phase3_blurb: Connect Northern Province producers — Jaffna mango, palmyra, dried fish — to verified buyers with provenance trails from harvest to point of sale.
footer: © 2026 Cloud Parallax (Pvt) Ltd. — Jaffna, Sri Lanka.
server_error: Server error — please try again later
register_nic_help: Optional. Linked only after authority-attested verification.
invalid_phone_msg: Invalid phone number. Must start with + and contain 7–15 digits.
register_unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
admin_login_blurb: This console is for Veḷi staff. Sign in with the Google account that was provisioned for you. If you do not have access, contact a Veḷi administrator.
admin_login_blurb_ta: வெளி உறுப்பினர்களுக்கான பக்கம். உங்களுக்கு வழங்கப்பட்ட Google கணக்குடன் உள்நுழையவும்.
admin_login_security_note: Sessions last 12 hours. Sign-in is logged.
admin_login_security_note_ta: உங்கள் அமர்வு 12 மணி நேரம் செல்லுபடியாகும். உள்நுழைவு பதியப்படுகிறது.
admin_login_error_not_provisioned: Your Google account is not authorised for this admin console. Contact a Veḷi administrator.
admin_login_error_not_provisioned_ta: உங்கள் Google கணக்கு இந்த நிர்வாக பக்கத்திற்கு அனுமதிக்கப்படவில்லை. நிர்வாகியை தொடர்பு கொள்ளவும்.
admin_login_error_unconfigured: Google sign-in is not yet configured on this server.
admin_login_error_unconfigured_ta: Google உள்நுழைவு இந்த சேவையகத்தில் இன்னும் அமைக்கப்படவில்லை.
home_phase_status_blurb: Veḷi rolls out in five phases. Today we are in foundations — building the institutions, infrastructure, and trust layer that the rest depends on.
home_phase0_blurb: Legal form, partnerships, hardware, language assets, governance. The work that does not show but everything else rests on.
home_phase4_blurb: Three product lines woven into one civic infrastructure. Stewardship, succession, sustainability.
home_verification_blurb: Every document carries an explicit tier. Veḷi never inflates a self-asserted upload into something it is not. Only authority-attested has legal effect.
home_tier_self_asserted_blurb: You uploaded it. We record who, when, where. No legal effect.
home_tier_community_corroborated_blurb: Two or more named neighbours signed a witness statement. Useful evidence — still no legal effect.
home_tier_authority_attested_blurb: Notary public, lawyer, or government office attested. Legal effect.
home_channels_blurb: A smartphone is not required. The same procedure information is available through channels that already work in Northern Province.
home_channel_pwa_desc: Tamil-first web app, works offline, installs to home screen.
home_channel_ivr_desc: Call and listen. Procedure spoken in Jaffna Tamil register.
home_channel_ussd_desc: Short menu code from any phone. No data, no app.
home_channel_sms_desc: Text the shortcode, get the procedure summary back.
home_channel_hotline_desc: Speak with a trained Veḷi helper in Tamil. Cannot read or write? Use this.
admin_documents_list_intro: All documents recorded on the platform. Newest first. Click to inspect tier, attestations, chain of custody.
admin_documents_empty_body: No documents yet. Create one on a user's behalf to bootstrap.
admin_documents_verifications_empty: இன்னும் சரிபார்ப்பு பதிவு இல்லை — மேலே தொடங்கவும்.
admin_documents_create_subtitle: Record a document on behalf of a user
admin_documents_form_user_help: User ULID. Look up via Users tab.
admin_documents_form_captured_help: When the document was originally captured (not now)
admin_documents_form_device_help: Optional. Device identifier (IMEI suffix, hostname, etc.)
admin_documents_attest_notes_help: Optional. Witness statement summary, notarial reference, etc.
admin_documents_attest_error_self: Self-asserted requires the attester to be the document owner.
admin_documents_attest_error_community: Community-corroborated requires an attester other than the owner.
admin_documents_attest_error_authority: Authority-attested requires an external attester (not the owner).
procedures_index_intro: Find the right office, fee, form, and hours. Each entry shows when it was last verified by a Veḷi field worker against the actual office.
procedures_index_empty_body: No procedures published yet. Veḷi field workers are walking through them now.
procedures_fee_unspecified_en: Not specified at this verification level
procedures_legal_disclaimer: Veḷi இந்த நடைமுறை குறித்த தகவலை ஒன்றுசேர்க்கிறது; இது சட்டப்பூர்வ அறிவுரை அல்ல. இறுதி அதிகாரம் அலுவலகத்திடமே உள்ளது.
procedures_legal_disclaimer_en: Veḷi compiles this information; it is not legal advice. The office's word is final.
